EigenLUSolver.h
1 #ifndef EIGENLUSOLVER_H_
2 #define EIGENLUSOLVER_H_
3 
4 
5 
6 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/NonLinearSolver/LocalDirectSolverImpl/ILinearSolver.h"
7 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/NonLinearSolver/LocalDirectSolverImpl/ILinearSystem.h"
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/NonLinearSolver/LocalDirectSolverImpl/ILinearSystemBuilder.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/NonLinearSolver/LocalDirectSolverImpl/ILinearSystemVisitor.h"
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/NonLinearSolver/LocalDirectSolverImpl/LocalLinearSystemT.h"
11 
12 
13 
14 template<int N>
15 class EigenLUSolver : public LocalDirectSolverNamespace::ILinearSolver
16 {
17  public:
18 
19  typedef Eigen::Matrix<Real,N,N,Eigen::RowMajor> MatrixType ;
20  typedef Eigen::Matrix<Real,N,1> VectorType ;
21 
22  typedef LinearSystemT<MatrixType,VectorType> LinearSystemType ;
23 
25  EigenLUSolver()
26  : ILinearSolver()
27  , m_system(NULL)
28  , m_system_is_built(false)
29  , m_system_is_locked(false)
30  , m_builder(NULL)
31  {}
32 
34  virtual ~EigenLUSolver() {}
35 
36 public:
37  String getName() const {
38  return "EigenLUSolver" ;
39  }
40 
42  void init() {}
43 
45  void setLinearSystemBuilder(ILinearSystemBuilder * builder)
46  { m_builder = builder ; }
47 
49  ILinearSystem* getLinearSystem() { return m_system ; }
50 
52  bool buildLinearSystem(Integer nextBuildStage=BuildType::eBuildMatrix|BuildType::eBuildRhs)
53  {
54  bool flag = (m_builder?m_system->accept(m_builder):true) ;
55  m_system_is_built = true ;
56  m_system_is_locked = false ;
57  return flag ;
58  }
59 
60  bool buildLinearSystem(ILinearSystem* system,Integer nextBuildStage=BuildType::eBuildMatrix|BuildType::eBuildRhs)
61  {
62  bool flag = system->accept(m_builder) ;
63  m_system_is_built = true ;
64  m_system_is_locked = false ;
65  return flag ;
66  }
67 
68 
70 
71 
73  void start() {
74  delete m_system ;
75  m_system = new LinearSystemType() ;
76  }
78  void end() {
79  delete m_system ;
80  m_system = NULL ;
81  m_system_is_built = false ;
82  m_system_is_locked = false ;
83  }
84 
86  bool solve() {
87 
88  if(!m_system_is_built)
89  {
90  cerr<<"Linear system is not built, buildLinearSystem shoud be called first"<<endl ;
91  return false ;
92  }
93  if(m_system_is_locked)
94  {
95  cerr<<"linear system has already be solved once and has not been modified since" ;
96  return false ;
97  }
98  *(m_system->getX()) = m_system->getMatrix()->lu().solve(*m_system->getRhs()) ;
99  m_status.succeeded = true ;
100  m_status.error = 0 ;
101  m_status.iteration_count = 0 ;
102  m_status.residual = 0. ;
103  m_system_is_locked = true ;
104  return true ;
105  }
106 
108  const ILinearSolver::Status & getStatus() const { return m_status ; }
109 
111  bool getSolution() {
112  if(m_builder)
113  return m_builder->commitSolution(m_system) ;
114  else
115  return false ;
116  }
117 
118  void setNullSpaceConstantOption(bool flag) {
119  cout<<"Null Space Constant Option not yet implemented"<<endl ;
120  }
121 private :
122  LinearSystemType* m_system ;
123 
125  bool m_system_is_built ;
126 
128  bool m_system_is_locked ;
129  ILinearSystemBuilder* m_builder ;
130  ILinearSolver::Status m_status ;
131 };
132 #endif /*EIGENLUSOLVER_H_*/
